overall.description: First-person perspective walking through a futuristic cyberpunk city promenade at dusk, featuring neon-lit cylindrical advertising towers, hexagonal paving, and sparse pedestrian NPCs. High-fidelity game engine footage with atmospheric lighting and modern glass buildings reminiscent of Cyberpunk 2077's Night City.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic pedestrian promenade with industrial storage containers

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the hexagonal-tiled promenade with industrial containers on the left

entered.detail: bright orange metal railing running along the right side of the walkway
stacked pallets and metal containers against the building wall
tall modern building with illuminated grid windows
tall cylindrical building covered in glowing red and white advertisements
covered walkway bridge visible in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic city walkway at dusk, bordered by an orange safety railing on the right and industrial storage containers on the left. The camera moves forward along hexagonal paving toward a distant cylindrical tower covered in neon advertisements, with a modern glass office building rising on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian walkway with large decorative planters

agents.ego_description: continuing forward past large planters with spiky foliage on the left

entered.detail: large black planters containing tall spiky tropical plants with illuminated undersides

segments.scene_description: The industrial containers give way to large decorative planters with spiky tropical plants on the left. The cylindrical advertising tower becomes more prominent on the right as the walkway continues forward, maintaining the hexagonal pavement and orange railing.

scene_state.functional_zone: pedestrian rest area with benches and river view

events.description: pedestrian NPCs become visible ahead, seated on benches and leaning on railing

agents.ego_description: approaching and passing seated pedestrians on benches and a woman leaning on the railing

notable_agents.action: person in dark hoodie sitting on wooden bench looking at a handheld device
woman in red top and jeans leaning on orange railing looking out at the view

entered.detail: illuminated wooden benches with metal frames lined along the left wall

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a social rest area with illuminated wooden benches on the left. A person in a hoodie sits on a bench while a woman in red leans on the railing to the right. The overhead bridge structure becomes more prominent ahead as the camera passes the final planters.

agents.ego_description: walking toward the overhead bridge structure with another seated pedestrian visible

notable_agents.action: person in dark clothing sitting on bench with legs crossed

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches the covered pedestrian bridge ahead, with the orange railing continuing along the right. Another seated NPC is visible on a bench to the left as the walkway leads toward the overhead structure, with the neon-lit cylindrical tower still dominating the right side of the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous forward movement along a futuristic city promenade that transitions from an industrial corridor into a populated social plaza. It begins on a walkway of hexagonal paving, moving past industrial storage containers and a modern glass office building toward a distant, neon-lit cylindrical advertising tower. As the camera advances, the industrial containers give way to large decorative planters filled with spiky tropical plants, while the glowing tower becomes more prominent on the right. The scene then shifts into a social rest area featuring illuminated wooden benches where a person in a hoodie sits and a woman in red leans against the orange safety railing. Finally, the camera passes a last seated figure and approaches a large covered pedestrian bridge that looms ahead under the persistent glow of the neon advertisements.
